title: 第2節　朝食の湯気
chapterTitle: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る

prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る / 第2話　汗が引くまで. Scene focus: 第2節　朝食の湯気 / サトーパート. Summary: キッチンでコーヒーを注ぎ直し、紙袋からパンを出して皿へ並べる。走ったあとの朝食は、凝ったことをしないほうがうまい。ハムとチーズのパンを半分に割ると、まだ少し温かかった。シナモン… Key beats: キッチンでコーヒーを注ぎ直し、紙袋からパンを出して皿へ並べる。走ったあとの朝食は、凝ったことをしないほうがうまい。ハムとチーズのパンを半分に割ると、まだ少し温かかった。シナモンロールの甘い匂いがコーヒーの苦みと混ざり、部屋の中へ朝の完成した感じが広がる。 テーブルに座り、最初のひと口をゆっくり噛む。空腹で急いで食べるのではなく、朝の続きとしてちゃんと味わえる。それがうれしい。白鷺川の風、橋の冷たさ、桜吹雪の土手、対岸の朝日。走っている最中の景色が、パンを噛んでいるうちにもう一度だけ静かに戻ってきた。 窓の外では、花びらが一枚だけ風に乗って過ぎていった。今日はこのあと洗濯をして、少し仕事を片づけて、昼には普通の一日に戻るだろう。その前に、朝がきちんとよかったと思える時間があるなら、それで十分だ。 路地のほうで、配送員らしい人影が一瞬だけ立ち止まり、すぐに見えなくなった。配達先を探していたのだろう。午前中の住宅街ではよくあることだと、サトーはコーヒーの湯気へ視線を戻した。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-part of the same breakfast-finale incident as scene-003-002-002-sera. Keep the same apartment table, same bread and coffee, and same clean morning light in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a peaceful breakfast image with Sato dominant at his apartment table, coffee and fresh bread visible, clearly concluding that the morning jog was worthwhile. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato beyond the window line or distant exterior edge, distant but readable, never companion-like.
